title: Pitești、Argeș — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Pitești、Argeșの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

PiteștiはArgeșにある人口155,383の都市です。A major industrial center in southern Romania, known for its automotive industry (Dacia/Renault), the nearby Curtea de Argeș Monastery, and the Trivale Park.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
